title: WealthyAndGrowth
description: This mod add more unique tweek for Villager or your Village life!
body:
# WealthyAndGrowth
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9qnTnpKy/images/5788c4d8d5f320ad51d75b10ac6b52516deb3381.png)

### 🍞Summary

This mod add more unique tweek for Villager or your Village life.

This mod still has few elements, but if you have any ideas please let me know!

 

### 🔧Tweeks

Illager Patrol has no longer come for you!(but if you attack the illager they will come to patrol more often)

If you in the village. increase patrol spawn chance(If you not in the village decrease patrol spawn chance)

Farmer Villager now harvest pumpkin and water melon! also they make pumpkin pie!

Fisher Villager now fishing! and pick up fish!

Villager now eat water melon and pumpkin pie!(even you can configurable!)

Villager when low health. eat food!

This mod Feature can toggleable in config!
